Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.listener
  2. RedisMessageListenerContainer

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.redis.listener.RedisMessageListenerContainer

Packages that use RedisMessageListenerContainer
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.annotation
Annotations and support classes for declarative Redis listener endpoints.
org.springframework.data.redis.config
Namespace and configuration.
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.listener
Base package for Redis message listener / pubsub container facility

    Methods in org.springframework.data.redis.config with parameters of type RedisMessageListenerContainer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractRedisListenerEndpoint.register(RedisMessageListenerContainer listenerContainer)
     
    void
    RedisListenerEndpoint.register(RedisMessageListenerContainer listenerContainer)
    Set up the specified message listener container with the model defined by this endpoint.
    void
    RedisListenerEndpointRegistrar.registerEndpoint(RedisListenerEndpoint endpoint, RedisMessageListenerContainer container)
    Register a new RedisListenerEndpoint alongside the RedisMessageListenerContainer.
    void
    RedisListenerEndpointRegistry.registerListener(RedisListenerEndpoint endpoint, RedisMessageListenerContainer container)
    Register a new RedisListenerEndpoint with the given RedisMessageListenerContainer.

  • Uses of RedisMessageListenerContainer in org.springframework.data.redis.core

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RedisKeyValueAdapter.setMessageListenerContainer(RedisMessageListenerContainer messageListenerContainer)
    Configure a RedisMessageListenerContainer to listen for Keyspace expiry events.
